name: Rosewood Hong Kong
senseOfPlace: The soaring city estate — harbour view, cultural centerpiece of the Cheng family's Victoria Dockside complex. Asaya wellness, Henry's, Chaat. East-meets-West, tailored elegance and verticality.

amenityOptions.name: Mooncake — single, hand-painted
amenityOptions.story: Hong Kong's mooncake tradition — Kee Wah has made them since 1938

amenityOptions.name: Tea flight — three estates
amenityOptions.story: Curated by Lock Cha — Hong Kong's most respected tea master

amenityOptions.name: Egg tarts, still warm
amenityOptions.story: Chris Patten's favourite — a Hong Kong civic memory in pastry form

amenityOptions.name: XO sauce — single jar
amenityOptions.story: Spring Moon's house XO; the recipe predates the building

amenityOptions.name: Almond cookies, hand-folded
amenityOptions.story: Made since 1962; a quiet Wan Chai institution, never franchised

amenityOptions.name: Jasmine-infused Pat Chun vinegar set
amenityOptions.story: Pat Chun's family vinegar house — the table condiment of Cantonese kitchens

signatureExperiences.title: Sunrise Tai Chi on the harbour terrace
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Victoria Harbour view; Asaya signature ritual

signatureExperiences.title: Private gallery walk — M+ Museum
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Adjacent to property; Asian contemporary art at scale

signatureExperiences.title: Cat Street antiques crawl with curator
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Sheung Wan's antique row; a Hong Kong design historian leads

signatureExperiences.title: Dragon's Back hike with guide
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Shek O ridgeline — the city's quietest morning view

signatureExperiences.title: Wong Kar-wai film locations walk
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Mong Kok / Central in WKW's frames — a guest-requested past favourite
signatureExperiences.vendorOrPlace: Hong Kong Island and Kowloon, guided

signatureExperiences.title: Yat Lok roast goose private dinner
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Michelin-starred roast goose at a 14-seat Central institution

signatureExperiences.title: Big Wave Bay sunrise SUP
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Hong Kong's surf cove; SUP rental and instructor at first light

signatureExperiences.title: Wing Lee Street tea ceremony
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Preserved 1950s street; a Lock Cha private tea ceremony

placemakers.name: Selena Lai
placemakers.bio: Third-generation Lock Cha master; private tastings for Rosewood guests.

placemakers.name: Manav Tuli
placemakers.domain: Indian regional cooking, Hong Kong register
placemakers.bio: Executive chef at Chaat; trained at Indian Accent Delhi. Brings Indian regional traditions to the Victoria Dockside harbour.
